name: ChatVLSC Secure Connectivity Gate
pass_conditions: Workspace MCP config includes ChatVLSC alpha and Zapier entries without credentials.
WARP MCP config includes ChatVLSC current and Zapier entries without credentials.
Cloudflare WARP is connected and network healthy.
cloudflared, CloudflareWARP, and CloudflareWARPUpdater services are running.
Current and alpha ChatVLSC MCP endpoints reject unauthenticated probes through Cloudflare Access or equivalent auth.
Zapier MCP endpoint is reachable but rejects unauthenticated probes until OAuth is completed.
secret_handling: Do not pass Cloudflare Access client secret headers unless testing from an approved ignored local environment.
Do not write response bodies, redirect URLs, bearer tokens, OAuth codes, service-token secrets, or API keys to source.
Keep cloudflared tunnel tokens only in Cloudflare/cloudflared service configuration.
next_steps: Run the local Cloudfare.config connectivity gate before each MCP route or auth configuration change.
After a Cloudflare Access service token is created and stored in an approved secret store, add a separate ignored authenticated probe.
Retest production JSON-RPC initialize and tools/list only with approved Access credentials.
Keep this sanitized gate mirrored to GitHub; keep authenticated probe output local only.
